get-in-touch.label: Get in Touch
get-in-touch.body: Email or call us with your date, group size, and what you have in mind. We will respond within 24 hours.

custom-proposal.label: Custom Proposal
custom-proposal.body: We put together a package tailored to your event — menu, space configuration, drinks, and pricing.

confirm-and-deposit.label: Confirm and Deposit
confirm-and-deposit.body: Review the proposal, sign the agreement, and secure your date with a deposit.

your-event.label: Your Event
your-event.body: Show up. We handle everything else. Our team runs the event so you can actually enjoy it.
